name: Thermal Desktop
description: Specialised thermal analysis software for spacecraft and launch vehicle thermal design. Handles radiation modelling, orbital thermal environments, and cryogenic system analysis with aerospace-specific capabilities.
whyUseIt: Spacecraft thermal design requires modelling radiation heat transfer in vacuum, solar heating, Earth albedo, and cryogenic propellant management. Thermal Desktop is purpose-built for these problems and trusted on major missions from James Webb to Dragon.
funnelPosition: Spacecraft and launch vehicle thermal design

vocabulary.definition: Multi-Layer Insulation — the gold-coloured blankets on spacecraft that minimise radiative heat transfer
The fraction of radiation leaving one surface that reaches another — critical for spacecraft thermal modelling

beginnerMistakes: Ignoring the orbital thermal environment (sunlight vs eclipse)
Not modelling radiative coupling between components
